title: cupania emarginata
intro: Cupania emarginata, a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, is commonly known as the yellow copaiba or copaiba tree. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cupania emarginata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds, leaves, and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
